reviews.author: Nhat Pham
reviews.summary: No review comments have been made yet. The thread is waiting for reviewers to provide feedback.

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch series implements virtual swap space, a new design for swap management that dynamically allocates virtual slots for swapped-out pages and associates them with physical swap slots on the swapfile or partition. The virtual swap slot is used to index into swap data structures such as the swap cache and zswap tree, replacing the old physical swap slot. The patch series also repurposes the swap table infrastructure as a reverse map to look up virtual swap slots from their associated physical swap slots.
